ordinanceLabel: Marysville Municipal Code · eCode360 (ecode360.com/MA4528) · Chapter 13 (Buildings & Construction) · Current through Ord. 1457 (Aug 20, 2024)
fireAgency: City of Marysville Fire Department · City-operated (not a separate fire district) · Fire life-safety review coordinated through City of Marysville Building Department at 526 C Street · Enforces California Fire Code per MMC Chapter 13.20 under supervision of fire chief · Note: 'Marysville Fire District' at marysvillefiredistrict.org is Marysville, WA — no jurisdiction here
utility: PG&E — Pacific Gas & Electric · Electric and gas service · Solar interconnection through PG&E Rule 21 / NEM program
